summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory items. No GitHub mutations are permitted. No item has the complete merge preflight required for merge_candidate; three items are conservatively kept for separate handling, and two require targeted maintainer judgment because of broad/unclear scope or active author follow-up.

This is an independent non-security agent behavior PR. It is not a duplicate of the gateway/Copilot/outbound items, and merge is blocked only by missing complete merge_preflight.
This is an independent outbound routing fix with a focused diff. It should not be closed or merged from this plan because the required merge preflight is missing.
Maintainer judgment is required because the PR is explicitly waiting on author and ClawSweeper found issues before merge. It is related to #92241 but should not be merged or replaced from this plan.
